languages.text: "Чего?.. Я таких слов не знаю. Зато знаю, что лучший убийца, как вы сказали, остается таким только пока имеет вес среди солдат. Или пока его боятся".
"Huh? I don't know those fancy words. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the troops respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."
languages.original_text: "Чего?.. Я таких слов не знаю. Зато знаю, что лучший убийца, как вы сказали, остается таким только пока имеет вес среди солдат. Или пока его боятся".

traits.locale_text: "Huh? I don't know fancy words like those. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the men respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."
"Huh? I don't know those fancy words. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the men respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."
"Zarkov demands it — survival of the fittest. But I must agree that, in the long term, it's lunacy."
"Huh? I don't know fancy words like those. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the men respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."
"Huh? I don't know those fancy words. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the men respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."
"Huh? I don't know those fancy words. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the troops respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."

languages.text: 「ザルコフはそれを要求している――適者生存だ。だが、長期的に見れば狂気だという点では、私も認めざるをえない」
languages.original_text: "Zarkov demands it — survival of the fittest. But I must agree that, in the long term, it's lunacy."

traits.locale_text: 「ザルコフはそれを要求している――適者生存だ。だが、長期的に見れば狂気だという点では、私も認めざるをえない。」

languages.text: « Hein ? Je ne vois pas de quoi vous voulez parler, mais une chose est sûre : le meilleur tueur, comme vous dites, ne reste en place que tant qu'il commande le respect de ses troupes. Ça, ou la peur. »
languages.original_text: "Huh? I don't know those fancy words. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the troops respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."

traits.locale_text: « Hein ? Je ne vois pas de quoi vous voulez parler, mais une chose est sûre : le meilleur tueur, comme vous dites, ne reste en place que tant qu'il commande le respect de ses troupes. Ça, ou la peur. »

« Hein ? Je ne vois pas de quoi vous voulez parler, mais une chose est sûre : le meilleur tueur, comme vous dites, ne reste en place que tant qu'il commande le respect de ses hommes. Ça, ou la peur. »

languages.text: "Ben o süslü kelimeleri bilmem. Şunu bilirim: Sizin deyiminizle en iyi katil, birlikleri ona saygı duyduğu veya ondan korktuğu müddetçe zirvede kalır."
languages.original_text: "Huh? I don't know those fancy words. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the troops respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."

traits.locale_text: "Ben o süslü kelimeleri bilmem. Şunu bilirim: Sizin deyiminizle en iyi katil, birlikleri ona saygı duyduğu veya ondan korktuğu müddetçe zirvede kalır."
"Ben o süslü kelimeleri bilmem. Şunu bilirim: Sizin deyiminizle en iyi katil, adamları ona saygı duyduğu veya ondan korktuğu müddetçe zirvede kalır."

languages.text: «¿Eh? No conozco el significado de esas palabras. Lo que sí sé es que el mejor asesino, como usted lo llama, solo manda si sus soldados lo respetan. O lo temen».
languages.original_text: "Huh? I don't know those fancy words. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the troops respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."

traits.locale_text: «¿Eh? No conozco el significado de esas palabras. Lo que sí sé es que el mejor asesino, como usted lo llama, solo manda si sus soldados lo respetan. O lo temen».
«¿Eh? No conozco el significado de esas palabras. Lo que sí sé es que el mejor asesino, como usted lo llama, solo manda si sus hombres lo respetan. O lo temen».

languages.text: “哈？我不懂那些文绉绉的词。但我知道一点：您口中的‘最强杀手’能当老大，要么靠的是手下人的尊重，要么就是因为他们的畏惧。”
languages.original_text: "Huh? I don't know those fancy words. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the troops respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."

traits.locale_text: “哈？我不懂那些文绉绉的词。但我知道一点：您口中的‘最强杀手’能当老大，要么靠的是手下人的尊重，要么就是因为他们的畏惧。”

languages.text: "Hm? Ich kenne diese hochtrabenden Worte nicht. Aber eines weiß ich: Der beste Killer, wie Ihr sagt, bleibt nur an der Spitze, solange ihn die Truppen respektieren. Oder solange sie ihn fürchten."
languages.original_text: "Huh? I don't know those fancy words. But I know this: the best killer, as you put it, is only on top as long as the troops respect them. Either that, or as long as they're feared."

traits.locale_text: "Hm? Ich kenne diese hochtrabenden Worte nicht. Aber eines weiß ich: Der beste Killer, wie Ihr sagt, bleibt nur an der Spitze, solange ihn die Truppen respektieren. Oder solange sie ihn fürchten."
"Hm? Ich kenne diese hochtrabenden Worte nicht. Aber eines weiß ich: Der beste Killer, wie Ihr sagt, bleibt nur an der Spitze, solange ihn die Männer respektieren. Oder solange sie ihn fürchten."
